violations.description: SANITIZATION OF EQUIP. AND UTENSILS (4 pts): Inadequate sanitizing with chlorine was noted in the three compartment sink. Corrected onsite
POISONS/TOXIC MATERIALS AND MEDICINE (3 pts): Chemical spray bottles noted not labeled in food prep area.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Ceiling and ceiling vents in the establishment noted in need of cleaning.
LIGHTING (1 pts): Ceiling lights noted not shielded in food prep area.
SANITIZATION OF EQUIP. AND UTENSILS (4 pts): Inadequate sanitizing with chlorine was noted in the three compartment sink. Sink drained and refilled with adequate sanitizer
CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Food noted being stored on the floor in walk-in freezer
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Ceiling and ceiling vents in the food prep area noted in need of cleaning.
IN-USE UTENSILS (1 pts): In - use utensil noted being stored with the handle laying in the ice
